description: Analysis of theory and practice of community development in selected cultural settings in the U.S. and other countries; role of community development in social welfare systems; problems and techniques of developing local citizen interest and leadership; community development in relation to other social work methods and community institutions and processes.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing and declared in Social Welfare or Social Work undergraduate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing and declared in Social Welfare or Social Work undergraduate program
